LanguageData.StatusAllocationTerminal.label: Status Allocation Terminal
LanguageData.StatusAllocationTerminal.description: A status allocation terminal from the advanced technology of the Omniversal Corporation, capable of manually or automatically granting status effects to colonists.
LanguageData.StatusAllocationTerminal_mini.label: Status Allocation Terminal (Portable)
LanguageData.StatusAllocationTerminal_mini.descriptio: A status allocation terminal from the advanced technology of the Omniversal Corporation, capable of manually or automatically granting status effects to colonists.
